title: hirtellina kurdica
intro: Hirtellina kurdica, a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae, is also known as Kurdish borage or Kurdish bryony. Traditionally, Hirtellina kurdica has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant's health benefits include relief from symptoms associated with indigestion, stomach ulcers, and diarrhea. Hirtellina kurdica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate these conditions.
